ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the client */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the client */,
  "assigned_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM agent assigned to the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_assigned_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM agent who made the communication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., Email, Phone Call) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the communication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client related to the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CRM agent responsible for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert for follow-up */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Follow-up Required) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., High Engagement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_categories_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client related to the activity (if applicable) */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., Login, Update Client) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client related to the notification (if applicable) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
